text: The first scene fills me with a sense of anticipation and calm—an empty, well-lit, modern space creates the impression of possibility, yet its emptiness makes me question purpose and belonging. The second scene, vibrant and filled with text and technology, feels stimulating—my mind becomes alert, curiosity piqued by the narrative of innovation and the promise of connection between humans and machines. I feel both grounded and inspired, aware of the present yet drawn toward what is to come.
